strongest_principles.statement: Only analyze raw audio when manifest analysis_allowed is true.
strongest_principles.rationale: Study manifest explicitly separates authorization and analysis policies.
strongest_principles.transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

strongest_principles.statement: Transform structural intent rather than copying melodic phrases.
strongest_principles.rationale: Consensus rows repeatedly reject direct source-copy behavior.
strongest_principles.transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

strongest_principles.statement: When witnesses conflict, carry conflict into composition constraints.
strongest_principles.rationale: Consensus schema stores qualitative conflicts explicitly.
strongest_principles.transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

strongest_principles.statement: Downgrade confidence where no real backend confirms observations.
strongest_principles.rationale: Many rows mark no_real_backend_confirmation in weak evidence areas.
strongest_principles.transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

strongest_principles.statement: Use meter and groove hints as guidance with room for reinterpretation.
strongest_principles.rationale: Witnesses offer probabilistic meter hints with disagreements preserved.
strongest_principles.transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

weak_evidence_limits: Most consensus rows rely on heuristic/local evidence due to unavailable optional backends.
No claim of full source-audio understanding is made when witnesses are unavailable.
Conflicting witness claims remain unresolved without additional validated backends.
witness_influence_summary: Heuristic local feature witness influences timing and structure hints.
Unavailable backend witnesses only contribute blockers and risk annotations.
rejected_principles: Do not optimize for musicality score-first outputs.
Do not suppress witness disagreement to produce a single average narrative.
transformation_vs_copy_policy: Generate transformed derivatives guided by principles; avoid direct copying of source content.
